Sources

References & framework crosswalk

Checked primary sources for market and framework claims. Witness AI product specifications cited separately.

Framework crosswalk — Witness AI gates to standards

Educational framework mapping only — not legal advice, certification, or regulatory approval.

Witness AI gate NIST AI RMF ISO 42001 EU AI Act OWASP LLM
Policy at dispatch GOVERN 1.x Clause 8.2 Art. 14 LLM06
Signed receipt MEASURE 2.x Clause 9.1 Art. 12 LLM08
Human ESCALATE GOVERN 2.x Clause 6.1 Art. 14(4)(d) LLM09
Agent threat coverage MAP 1.x Clause 8.3 Art. 9 LLM07

References & sources

Checked primary sources for market and framework claims. Witness AI product specifications cited separately.

  1. Gartner, Inc. (2025, June 25). Gartner Predicts Over 40% of Agentic AI Projects Will Be Canceled by End of 2027. https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2025-06-25-gartner-predicts-over-40-percent-of-agentic-ai-projects-will-be-canceled-by-end-of-2027 External · market research
  2. McKinsey & Company. (2025). Seizing the agentic AI advantage. QuantumBlack, McKinsey. https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/quantumblack/our-insights/seizing-the-agentic-ai-advantage External · strategy research
  3. McKinsey & Company. (2025). Trust in the age of agents. Risk & Resilience. https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/risk-and-resilience/our-insights/trust-in-the-age-of-agents External · governance research
  4. National Institute of Standards and Technology. (2023). Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0). https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework Framework · NIST
  5. International Organization for Standardization. (2023). ISO/IEC 42001:2023 — Artificial intelligence — Management system. https://www.iso.org/standard/81230.html Framework · ISO
  6. European Parliament and Council. (2024). Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (AI Act). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=OJ:L_202401689 Regulation · EU
  7. OWASP Foundation. (2025). OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications. https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/ Framework · OWASP
  8. Witness AI. (2026). Witness AI Flow — default agentic governance install scope. Editorial standards · witnessbc.com/observe/principles/. https://witnessbc.com/observe/principles/ Product · Witness AI
  9. MITRE. (2024). MITRE ATLAS — Adversarial Threat Landscape for Artificial-Intelligence Systems. https://atlas.mitre.org/ Framework · MITRE
  10. National Institute of Standards and Technology. (2024). Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework/generative-artificial-intelligence-profile Framework · NIST
Witness AI provides educational AI policy templates and governance workflow tooling — not legal, compliance, or certification services. Market statistics cite independent third-party research. Framework alignment is illustrative mapping only.
